description: Chunk-level bundle budgets used by scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs. These values were refreshed from docs/developer/quality/baselines/perf-bundle-2026-04-30.json with modest headroom so intentional growth can land without turning the budget into constant noise. The allChunks total was later raised to match the current lazy-split layout. The App CSS budget was refreshed after the dialog-style consolidation and Auto Setup diagnostics/rig-map preview styling. The AutoSetupDialog budget was refreshed after adding public-profile safety validation, managed controller-rig bindings, occlusion cleanup preview reporting, the measured 86,944-byte editor-core See-through command extraction build, the store-owned Auto Setup apply workflow, the 88,971-byte editor-core Auto Setup apply command extraction build, the visible Layer Graph/Safe Plan diagnostics preview, the Q3/Q4 layer occlusion cleanup command/module split, the Auto Setup step-rendering UI extraction, the Auto Setup detect see-through/generation panel split, safety visualization for saved operations versus discarded preview-only data, public-safe motion stress warning projection, action-oriented cleanup comparison copy, and the contributor-facing Auto Setup preview responsibility split measured in docs/developer/quality/baselines/perf-bundle-2026-05-21.json. These values should now be treated as the new regression guardrail.
